hero.label: Made for JustAI
hero.headline: I want to build JustAI's enterprise sales engine from zero.
hero.subheadline: JustAI is solving a massive problem in enterprise marketing: the manual, repetitive work of personalizing at scale. With Neha's product pedigree from Twitter and Pinterest, and YC backing, this is the exact founding moment I want to be part of. I've already proven I can acquire paying customers in B2B; now I want to scale that motion at a company with real product-market fit.

whyCompany.title: Solving the personalization problem at enterprise scale
whyCompany.body: Every enterprise marketer is stuck manually building 'octopuses' in their CRM. JustAI removes that friction with agentic AI that runs on autopilot. This isn't a feature; it's a fundamental shift in how teams operate. That's a wedge worth selling hard.

whyCompany.title: Founding BDR role at the exact right moment
whyCompany.body: JustAI is 5 people, YC-backed, and hiring aggressively. This is the 0-to-1 sales moment where the first BDR gets to define the playbook, own the customer relationships, and grow into Head of Sales. In a year, this role either disappears into a team or becomes the foundation of a revenue org.

whyCompany.title: I've already closed B2B deals; now I'll do it at scale
whyCompany.body: At Copygen I didn't just run sequences; I helped acquire 15-20 paying clients using HubSpot, LinkedIn prospecting, and real follow-through. At NextAfter I learned how enterprise B2B sales actually works in a consultancy setting. I know how to hunt, qualify, and close. JustAI gives me the product and the moment to prove I can scale that.

quote: I've spent the last year learning how to close enterprise deals. Now I want to do it for a product I actually believe in, at a company building the future of marketing.
